title: Maryland DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes
description: Narrative research notes for Maryland DDS examiner and supervisor pay: administering agency (MSDE/DORS DDS Branch), official class codes and grades (Disability Claims Examiner I = 5260, Grade 14/ASTD; Disability Claims Examiner Supervisor = 5263, Grade 19), salary ranges from JobAps class specs/postings, AFSCME representation (supervisor in Unit S), the DBM Standard Salary Schedule (eff 2025-07-01), and data gaps. Companion to MD/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: Maryland Department of Budget and Management (DBM); MSDE/DORS Disability Determination Services Branch
source.title: MD DDS salary research notes (JobAps class specs + DBM Standard Salary Schedule)

notes: Authoritative: official class codes (5260, 5263) and grades (14/ASTD, 19) cited from MD JobAps class specifications with salary ranges, mapped to the DBM Standard Salary Schedule (eff 2025-07-01). Note the salary ranges cited in the notes ($58,428–$90,709 examiner; $80,541–$125,564 supervisor) come from a job posting and differ slightly from the sibling JSON's exact step grid ($62,220–$96,790; $85,963–$133,951). Open gaps: full intermediate steps, exact AFSCME unit (C vs other), Examiner II salary, Grade 14 vs 19 confirmation.
